---
title: "Blog"
toc: true
listing:
  contents: blog
  sort: "date desc"
  type: default
  fields: [title, description, date, categories]
---

Welcome to the `care-code-connect` blog! 🤗

*"Revisioning data science for the age of AI"*

This space collects reflections on how we can revision data science as a human-centric discipline in the age of AI. New posts will appear below ...
